projectName: Relaxed JSON Input for Both Editors
description: Allow JS-style object literals (unquoted keys, single quotes, trailing commas) in DocumentEditor and QueryEditor using json5 parsing and CodeMirror JavaScript language mode

userStories.title: Install json5 and @codemirror/lang-javascript dependencies
userStories.description: As a developer, I need json5 and @codemirror/lang-javascript installed so the editors can parse relaxed JSON and highlight it correctly

userStories.title: Swap DocumentEditor to javascript language mode and json5 parsing
userStories.description: As a user, I want the document editor to accept relaxed JSON syntax (unquoted keys, single quotes, trailing commas) so I can write documents more naturally
acceptanceCriteria: DocumentEditor imports javascript from @codemirror/lang-javascript instead of json from @codemirror/lang-json
DocumentEditor uses JSON5.parse instead of JSON.parse in handleSave
Error toast shows actual parse error message instead of generic 'Invalid JSON'
Typing {name: test} and saving shows descriptive error
userStories.notes: File: src/renderer/src/components/DocumentEditor.tsx. Swap json() → javascript() in extensions, JSON.parse → JSON5.parse in handleSave, improve error message in catch block.

userStories.title: Swap QueryEditor to javascript language mode
userStories.description: As a user, I want the query editor to accept relaxed JSON syntax so I can write queries with unquoted keys like {age: {$gt: 5}}
acceptanceCriteria: QueryEditor imports javascript from @codemirror/lang-javascript instead of json from @codemirror/lang-json
QueryEditor uses javascript() in extensions array
Existing autocomplete still works when typing quoted keys
userStories.notes: File: src/renderer/src/components/QueryEditor.tsx. Swap json() → javascript() in extensions. Leave autocomplete matcher as-is (triggers on double-quote only).

userStories.title: Swap store runQuery to json5 parsing
userStories.description: As a user, I want queries written in relaxed JSON to be parsed correctly when I click Run
acceptanceCriteria: runQuery uses JSON5.parse instead of JSON.parse
Error message includes actual parse error instead of generic 'Invalid JSON'
Running query with missing bracket shows descriptive error
userStories.notes: File: src/renderer/src/store.ts line 163. Swap JSON.parse → JSON5.parse, return actual error message from catch block.
